title: Ofuda Placement Service
description:
Ofuda Placement Service is a first-person horror game set in a school late at night, where you place Ofuda while being pursued by a spirit’s footprints and complete the request.

Setting and StoryIn the late 2040s, large-scale disasters caused by spirits, known as Spiritual Hazards, occurred almost simultaneously across Japan.

As a way to respond quickly to localized Spiritual Hazards, the Ofuda Placement Service became widespread.

In this game, you are dispatched to a school late at night as a Sealing Worker for the Ofuda Placement Service, where you use Ofuda to suppress spirits.

Gameplay

The Smart Glasses issued to Sealing Workers are equipped with functions that assist with sealing work.

They display Spirit Traces that normally cannot be seen and mark Ofuda Placement Points with cyan frames.

The number of Ofuda placed is shown in the upper-right corner, and the Sealing Worker’s Sanity is shown in the lower-left corner.

Sanity is indicated by color: cyan for Normal, yellow for Caution, and red for Danger.

Approaching a spirit may lower your Sanity.

If you sense a spirit’s Presence nearby, move away immediately.

Videos and StreamingVideo uploads, livestreams, and monetization are allowed.

Please include “Ofuda Placement Service” in the video title.

If possible, we would appreciate it if you could include a link to the Steam Store page in the video description or a similar section.

*Including the link is optional.
description_short: Ofuda Placement Service is a first-person horror game set in a school late at night, where you place Ofuda while being pursued by a spirit’s footprints and complete the request.
